mapper.sql: payment_id, bank_code, currency, support_type, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO payment_channel_bank ( payment_id, bank_code, currency, support_type, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.paymentId}, #{item.bankCode}, #{item.currency}, #{item.supportType}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
